title: SAIL is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: SAIL is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, SAIL in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SAIL:
SAIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL!
